headline: National Geographic Society, Chubb Charitable Foundation Select First Three Freshwater Wetland Sites for New Blue Boundaries Program
summary: Blue Boundaries, a partnership between the National Geographic Society and the Chubb Charitable Foundation, has selected its first focus locations across North America and Asia. Launched in 2025, the multiyear global initiative focuses on transformational change at the intersection of land and water.

headline: Curious about Chubb (CB) Q1 Performance? Explore Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for Chubb (CB), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended March 2026.
